monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian Ballistic Missiles Strike Al-Azraq Air Base in Jordan

— S4 · Conflict · Al-Azraq Air Base, Jordan · 7h ago. IRGC claims Khaybar-shekan ballistic missiles hit US fighter jet maintenance ramp and command center at Al-Azraq Air Base, Jordan, in 8th wave of Nasr 2 operation.
Iran Shuts Strait of Hormuz, Strikes US Targets Amid Nuclear Threat
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 13h ago. Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz and launches retaliatory strikes after US threatens nuclear sites, escalating the crisis.
— S4 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 23h ago. The Palestinian Health Ministry reports the death toll from Israel's military campaign in Gaza has risen to 73,246, with thousands more wounded.
Iran Strikes US Army Logistics Depot in Kuwait With Drones, Cruise Missiles
